column5: BitBinder is a professional comedy writing notebook built natively for iOS. Version 10.4 introduces BitBuddy — a fully on-device comedy writing assistant that understands joke structure and comedy theory — now accessible from every screen including mid-edit via a floating corner button. Comedians can capture ideas instantly with voice or text, organize jokes into folders with inline tag editing, build performance-ready set lists, record and auto-transcribe performances, brainstorm with color-coded sticky notes, scan handwritten notebooks, and write targeted roast comedy in a dedicated dark-themed Roast Mode. All data is private with on-device storage and optional iCloud sync across devices. No account or subscription required.
column16: BitBinder was built by a comedian for comedians. There is no other iOS app purpose-built for comedy writing with an on-device AI partner that understands setups, punchlines, callbacks, misdirection, rule of three, act-outs, and tagging. Every feature — voice capture, set list building, notebook scanning, Roast Mode — was designed around real stand-up workflows. We built this because we needed it ourselves, and nothing else existed.
